$comment: UK Law Firms AI Crawler Access Index. Each record is one firm's robots.txt and llms.txt as WE fetched them. 'state' records whether the file was genuinely readable or was gated by bot protection / returned a soft-404. Per-crawler 'status' describes the file's syntax shape only: 'not_listed' means the token does not appear (NOT a block); 'partial' means named with path-level or allowlist rules (NOT a judgement that the firm restricts AI); 'indeterminate' means we could not read the file. 'aiSpecificStance' is the derived judgement: 'restricts_ai_specifically' only when an AI token's effective directives (RFC 9309 grouping, most specific match wins) are clearly stricter than the same file's effective directives for Googlebot; restriction inherited from 'User-agent: *' or shared with Googlebot's own group is never AI-specific. robots.txt is a request, not enforcement.
study: UK Law Firms AI Crawler Access Index

firmListSource.title: Law Firm Rankings: 100 Leading Law Firms in UK in 2025
firmListSource.ranking: the top 100 UK law firms ranked primarily by revenue for 2025, of which we take the top 50.
firmListSource.compiledFrom: Stated by the source as compiled from Law Gazette, Legal Business, The University of Law, Non-Billable, Legal IT Insider, PwC, The Legal 500 and Wikipedia.
firmListSource.caveat: This is a secondary compilation, not a primary revenue audit. The Lawyer UK 200 and Legal Business LB100 are the primary rankings but are paywalled. Firm-to-domain mapping was done by inspection; a wrong domain would surface below as unreachable, not as a false directive.

method: For each firm's primary domain we fetched https://<domain>/robots.txt and https://<domain>/llms.txt ourselves with curl, following redirects, and saved every raw response verbatim under raw/. Three firms answered only on their www host (recorded in effectiveUrl). robots.txt was parsed with standard user-agent grouping. A response was only parsed for directives when its body was a genuine robots.txt; HTML bot-challenge pages (Vercel, Cloudflare, Azure WAF, Incapsula) returning 200/403/429 were recorded as unreadable, never parsed.

records.aiSpecificNote: robots.txt could not be read (bot protection or no response), so its stance is unknown.
